page: Microsoft Azure F2ams_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Famsv7 server family. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. It is, however, designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external storage volumes. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are bundled with this instance.

Given its memory-intensive profile of 8.0 GB per core, the F2ams_v7 offers a cost-efficient entry point for workloads requiring a larger memory footprint relative to compute power without the overhead of a high core count. This resource density makes the instance suitable for small-scale databases, caching layers, memory-intensive enterprise applications, and lightweight analytical workloads that fit within a 16.0 GB memory envelope.
description: Microsoft Azure F2ams_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine from the Famsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD x86_64 processor and is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. This server does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing the attachment of high-performance external storage volumes. Designed for workloads that require a larger memory footprint relative to compute capacity, the F2ams_v7 provides a resource-dense and cost-efficient option for small-scale databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive enterprise applications. It offers a balanced entry point for memory-bound tasks without the overhead of high core counts.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F2ams_v7 is a memory-intensive virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for small-scale databases and caching workloads.
